installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
cd /mnt/server

# Install git if needed
apk add --no-cache git bash

# Clone the server files directly into the server folder
git clone https://github.com/Mikahael/PCModderServerFiles-FINAL.git .

# Ensure binaries are executable
chmod +x bombsquad_server bs_headless

sed -i "s/DEFAULT_PORT_HERE/${SERVER_PORT}/g" bombsquad_server
